title: Harom Hara
subTitle: Subrahmanyam loses his job and faces financial ruin. In an attempt to overcome his limitations, he gets involved in the illegal arms trade, eventually becoming one of South India's notorious arms dealers.

title: Thadam
subTitle: While investigating the death of a man, the police track down their lead suspect. However, the case takes a twisted turn when they discover a clone of their suspect.

title: Aakhri Chaal : Ab kaun bachega
subTitle: Three brothers conspire against each other in a bid to take over their father's criminal empire following his sudden death. Meanwhile, someone else tries to take advantage of the rift between them.

title: Rudra Suryavanshi
subTitle: Gunasingam, a rich farmer, lives a humble life with his family. However, things take a turn when he falls in love with the most beautiful woman in the village.

title: Jaane Bhi Do Yaaro
subTitle: Two photographers, who are employed by a newspaper editor to expose the scandalous activities of the rich, come across corruption by a builder and accidentally photograph a murder.

title: Tu Hi Mera Pyar
subTitle: Raised in the US, a progressive Vijay does not believe in marriage. After he is forced into it by his father, it takes a long time for him to realise the significance of the institution.

title: Parole
subTitle: Alex, who is released on parole after eight years of imprisonment, sets out to reconcile with his son and settle some old scores.

title: Gully Rowdy
subTitle: A young man tries to find a balance between his love interest and friends. Meanwhile, his friends convince him to stay rowdy.

title: Gabbar Is Back
subTitle: The city's administration wrongs Aditya, a commoner. To avenge his tragedy, he disguises himself as a vigilante, Gabbar, and teams up with honest government officers to expose the corrupt.

title: Rudhran
subTitle: A man's life takes an unexpected turn when he stumbles upon a criminal network. Determined to bring the truth to light, he sets out to expose the nefarious organisation and protect his loved ones.

title: Hanu Man
subTitle: A local thief, who lives in the village of Anjanadri, comes across a Hanuman-like power. He must protect people from the peril that looms over them.

title: My Boss Bajrangbali
subTitle: A corrupt politician kills Anji's parents and plans to demolish a temple. Later, Lord Hanuman takes human form to help Anji fight the politician.

title: My Boss Bajrangbali
subTitle: A corrupt politician kills Anji's parents and plans to demolish a temple. Later, Lord Hanuman takes human form to help Anji fight the politician.

title: The Great Veera
subTitle: A police officer fears for the safety of his family after he incurs the wrath of a local gangster. Fortunately, a security officer is tasked with protecting him and his loved ones.

title: Satya Gang
subTitle: Satya and Raj, who are orphans, own a garage and make a living out of it. However, their lives turn tragic when a notorious gang commit numerous murders and make them the culprits.

title: Warrior Savitri
subTitle: Warrior Savitri

title: Karkash
subTitle: A wayward husband vows to punish his dutiful wife after a false rumour spreads in society that questions her fidelity. Eventually, the woman must take dire measures to prove her loyalty and honour.

title: Crazy Singh
subTitle: Bittu, a village simpleton, falls in love with a modern Saumya. Chaos ensues when their contrasting families meet to fix their marriage.

title: 777 Charlie
subTitle: Dharma, a broken man drowning in despair, finds his world transformed when he rescues Charlie, an abused pup. Later, they embark on a journey of hope and redemption.

title: Ragada
subTitle: Satya, a money-minded man, arrives in Hyderabad and starts working for a gangster, GK. However, he soon becomes the target of another gangster, Peddanna.

title: Etharkkum Thunindhavan
subTitle: Kannabiran, a lawyer, saves a young woman from a pornography racket run by Inba, a minister's son. However, Inba threatens to leak explicit videos of several women, making Kannabiran go after him.

title: Mawali Raaj
subTitle: In order to obtain a family of their own, two young children of two single parents devise a plan to bring them together.

title: Custody
subTitle: A police constable's life takes a drastic turn when he is entrusted with producing a criminal in court. While the mobster remains under his custody, Shiva must dodge every threat to keep him alive.

title: Maargan
subTitle: A serial killer targets women with a strange serum that turns their bodies black. Subsequently, a high-ranking police officer sets out to catch the culprit.

title: Raththam
subTitle: While investigating his friend's murder, Ranjith, a journalist, unearths the sinister network responsible for a series of crimes.

title: Raththam
subTitle: While investigating his friend's murder, Ranjith, a journalist, unearths the sinister network responsible for a series of crimes.

title: Parking
subTitle: A parking spot frays the relationship between two neighbours of different generations and world views. Soon, the two men find themselves in an escalating battle to have the space all to themselves.

title: Darling 2
subTitle: Five friends on a holiday in Valparai find their getaway turning eerie when they sense the haunting presence of a friend who recently died by suicide.

title: Ek Zakhmi Romeo
subTitle: Ananya loves her best friend, Surya, while he falls for another woman, Pooja. However, after his heartbreak, Surya is too late to realise who truly loved him as Ananya rejects him.

title: Phamous
subTitle: Radhe looks up to Kadak Singh, a local politician, but holds a grudge against his partner, Ram Tripathi. However, things reach a boiling point when Tripathi sets his sights on Radhe's wife, Lalli.

title: Dove
subTitle: Anoop and Aditi love each other but face an unexpected obstacle when Anoop gets charged with murder. Meanwhile, Kumar and Sona, who share an intimate relationship, try to overcome their challenges.

title: Damayanthi
subTitle: A young man struggles to pay off his father's debts and decides to visit his family's abandoned bungalow. However, he soon realises that it is haunted by a vengeful ghost.

title: Mohini
subTitle: Vaishnavi and Sandeep, a couple in love, are engaged to be married. However, things spiral out of control when she gets possessed by a lookalike who is thirsty for vengeance.

title: Kali Kitaab
subTitle: When narratives from a cryptic book spring to life, a woman experiences bizarre phenomena and resolves to uncover the identity of its enigmatic writer.

title: Gatta Kusthi
subTitle: Veera has a preconceived set of criteria for what he wants in a bride. However, he ends up unexpectedly marrying a woman who is the complete opposite of his expectations.

title: Fidaa
subTitle: An NRI medical student falls in love with a vivacious woman. However, they face challenges in their relationship due to their differences in personalities.

title: Guardian
subTitle: An unavenged woman returns from the dead to terrify and terrorise those who tormented her when she was alive.

title: Yashoda
subTitle: Surrogate mother Yashodha is advised to follow a few guidelines to keep herself and her baby healthy and safe. However, something happens at the surrogate centre that puts both of them at risk.

title: Indian Soldier Never On Holiday
subTitle: An army officer sets out to save the people of his country when he learns that an entire network of terrorists are operating in the city and are planning to carry out multiple terror attacks.
